tagline: When you attempt to drop a column that has one or more governed tags assigned, the operation now fails.
what_it_does: When you attempt to drop a column that has one or more governed tags assigned, the operation now fails. To drop a tagged column, you must first remove all governed tags from it. This page shows how to apply tags to Unity Catalog securable objects.
why_it_matters: When you attempt to drop a column that has one or more governed tags assigned, the operation now fails.
key_takeaway: When you attempt to drop a column that has one or more governed tags assigned, the operation now fails.
